steps.title: Follow the consequence
steps.content: Italian was the default language for opera scores for centuries. Because of that history, singers today encounter many Italian terms when following eighteenth-century opera scores.

steps.title: Choose the result signal
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, but the second sentence follows from the first. Choice C suggests a final item in a list that does not exist. Choice D signals concession, which the sentence does not need. A consequence transition fits. The answer is B.
